'''damazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ifetroban|ifetroban]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-m-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ifetroban|ifetroban]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| damazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæmæzhæth|dæmæzhæth]] || [[word:dæmæzhæj|dæmæzhæj]] || [[word:dæmæzhæsh|dæmæzhæsh]] || [[word:dæmæzhæ|dæmæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:damamazhath|damamazhath]] || [[word:damamazhaj|damamazhaj]] || [[word:damamazhash|damamazhash]] || [[word:damamazha|damamazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:damazhath|damazhath]] || [[word:damazhaj|damazhaj]] || [[word:damazhash|damazhash]] || [[word:damazha|damazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:damafzhafth|damafzhafth]] || [[word:damafzhafj|damafzhafj]] || [[word:damafzhafsh|damafzhafsh]] || [[word:damafzhaf|damafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:damazhatha|damazhatha]] || [[word:damazhaja|damazhaja]] || [[word:damazhasha|damazhasha]] || [[word:damazhaka|damazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:damazhath|damazhath]] || [[word:damazhaj|damazhaj]] || [[word:damazhash|damazhash]] || [[word:damazha|damazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:damazhathal|damazhathal]] || [[word:damazhajal|damazhajal]] || [[word:damazhashal|damazhashal]] || [[word:damazhakal|damazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:damazhaathatha|damazhaathatha]] || [[word:damazhaajaja|damazhaajaja]] || [[word:damazhaashasha|damazhaashasha]] || [[word:damazhaaka|damazhaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:damazhathan|damazhathan]] || [[word:damazhajan|damazhajan]] || [[word:damazhashan|damazhashan]] || [[word:damazhakan|damazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:damazhathaoro|damazhathaoro]] || [[word:damazhajaoro|damazhajaoro]] || [[word:damazhashaoro|damazhashaoro]] || [[word:damazhakaoro|damazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|34122d8}}
